description: Design and audit support incentives: what gets measured, what is free, what is kitted, and how the floor will move. Steering model for NDF and related ops metrics.

examples.context: Org scored NDF only. Parts cost climbed via untested SKUs.
examples.resolution: Paired NDF with parts cost and coverage map. Game shrank.

examples.context: Lead could move the floor with one policy email. No pre-mortem; chaos each quarter.
examples.resolution: Design sheet required before metric changes. Fewer thrash cycles.

examples.context: Wanted less orphan memory shotgun after line fix.
examples.resolution: Kit required for that path. Behavior followed the kit rule.

examples.context: Five-person shop. Owner yelled about redo rate; staff avoided logging redos.
examples.resolution: Logged redos without blame week; paired with cause codes. Data returned.
